cloudAppHelp: Pick the app your appliances are bound to. MSmartHome is the default; NetHome Plus, Midea Air and Ariston Clima talk the legacy V1 cloud. V1-firmware appliances on the LAN are not supported.
userHelp: E-mail address used in the chosen cloud app
passwordHelp: Password used in the chosen cloud app
intervalHelp: How often the adapter polls each device locally over the LAN. Range 5–3600 seconds (default 30).
